name: conformance: the live output meets or exceeds the golden decision coverage (no regression)
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/fullstack-international-aws-profile.json" --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
cp "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/fullstack-international-aws-requirements.json" golden.json
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const g=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("golden.json","utf8"));const a=Object.values(j.pillars).flat().length;const b=Object.values(g.pillars).flat().length;process.exit(a>=b?0:1)' && echo meets-golden 1>&2
